headline: Apple Joins Project Glasswing As Mythos AI Raises New Valuation Questions
summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has joined Project Glasswing, a multi company cybersecurity alliance using Anthropic’s new Mythos AI model. The alliance is focused on finding and fixing severe software vulnerabilities across major operating systems. Mythos is being deployed in a controlled, safety focused way to support secure, AI driven security workflows. Apple enters this alliance with a market profile that many investors already watch closely, supported by a 32.0% return over the past year and a...

headline: Apple is closing down first of its U.S. stores
summary: Apple has not had many public labor fights, but its latest just got a lot harder to ignore. The company confirmed on April 9 that it will permanently close its store at Towson Town Center in Maryland in June. The store will not be replaced. The Towson location was the first Apple retail store in ...

headline: Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest
summary: Replacing a $70,000 salary with dividend income alone requires a specific portfolio size, and the required portfolio size is larger than most people expect. At a 3.39% yield from SCHD, the portfolio required to generate $70,000 per year before taxes runs into the millions, and the exact figure shifts depending on which fund you choose. ... Why a $70,000 Dividend Income Goal Requires Millions, and Which ETF Gets You There Fastest

headline: TSMC’s Record Q1 AI Revenue Puts Capex And Growth In Focus
summary: TSMC (NYSE:TSM) reported preliminary Q1 2026 results showing record revenue growth, driven by strong demand for AI chips and advanced-node manufacturing. Revenue for the quarter was up 35% year on year, exceeding earlier expectations and supported by orders from major customers including Nvidia and Apple. The company also reported strong March 2026 revenue on both a month on month and year on year basis, alongside continued investment in capacity. Management issued a confident outlook for...
